items.name: Graphics
items.description:
T-shirt to supply high quality graphics for outrageously cheap. Everything will be hand drawn on nearly all graphics.
Just Message Details.
-If its a advertisement or and group logo.
-The colors.
-Place or name of the group.
-Type of style. Ex are Retro, Military, Gothic (ect.)
-Any details you'd like added into it.
-If ad's then say rather or no if its a banner, skyscraper, or large rectangle.  

All Graphics will be made within a day or so. 
Feel free to comment your thoughts below. 

And if you are in need of Custom Clothing link is below:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/2994554725/HF-Clothing
